actions.title: Capture required run volume
actions.action: Use `pnpm benchmark:loader:baseline:capture-next` and continue capture loops.
actions.eta: After completing the 50-run baseline capture target

actions.title: Post-capture checklist
actions.action: Execute failed post-capture checklist actions, then re-run refresh-and-sync.

actions.title: Telemetry usefulness
actions.detail: Granularity evidence gap (2.2.2.1.3): runs=0, missing-slices=network/reduction/render, unknown-rate=0%, no classified delay signatures.
actions.action: Close telemetry granularity gap (2.2.2.1.3): capture baseline runs with `pnpm benchmark:loader:baseline:capture-next`; record network/reduction/render delay slice evidence; capture at least one classified delay signature (network/reduction/render).
actions.eta: After capturing missing diagnostic evidence from next capture cycle

actions.title: Issue review
actions.action: Resolve active gate failures, then re-run refresh-and-sync to clear issue-review blockers.
actions.eta: After completeness and usefulness blockers clear
